---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new visualization or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: imkuldeepahlawat
---

## Description
What would you like to see added or changed?

## Use Case
Why would this be useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Visualization
If requesting a new DS/algorithm, describe how it should be visualized:
- What 3D elements should be shown?
- What operations should be interactive?
- What colors/animations would help understanding?

## Additional Context
Any references, links, or screenshots.
